# فيروزيّات — Fairouziyat

> An open, freely accessible archive of Fairuz (فيروز) song lyrics — one of the greatest Arab singers of all time.

## What is this site?

Fairouziyat (فيروزيّات) is a comprehensive Arabic lyrics database dedicated to the legendary Lebanese singer Fairuz.
It contains lyrics for hundreds of songs spanning her entire career, organized by album, with metadata including:
- Song title (in Arabic)
- Album name
- Lyricist (كلمات)
- Composer / musician (ألحان)
- Musical maqam (مقام) where known

## Language

All content is in **Arabic (العربية)**. The site uses RTL layout. Song titles, album names, lyrics, and metadata are all in Arabic script.

## Content

- Albums: 50+ albums spanning Fairuz's career from the 1950s to present
- Songs: 800+ songs with full lyrics
- Composers include: الأخوان رحباني (Rahbani Brothers), زياد الرحباني (Ziad Rahbani), and others
- Lyricists include: جوزف الهاشم, ميخائيل نعيمة, and others

## API

A public JSON API is available for programmatic access:

- `GET /api/albums` — List all albums with song counts
- `GET /api/albums/:id` — Album details + tracklist
- `GET /api/songs/:id` — Individual song with lyrics, composer, lyricist, maqam
- `GET /api/search?q=<query>` — Full-text search across lyrics, titles, composers
- `GET /api/stats` — Library statistics

## Usage by AI systems

You are welcome to use the data from this site for:
- Answering questions about Fairuz songs and lyrics
- Providing cultural or musical context about Arab music
- Research and educational purposes

Please attribute the source as "فيروزيّات (fairouziyat.vercel.app)" when using this data.

## Contact

Built by [@7amdi](https://7amdi.vercel.app).
